title: SELANK
description: Selank is a Russian peptide derived from tuftsin with anxiolytic and nootropic properties. It modulates GABA and serotonin systems, reducing anxiety while enhancing cognitive function without sedation or dependency.

research.title: Expression of inflammation-related genes in mouse spleen under tuftsin analog Selank
research.summary: Found significant changes in 34 inflammation-related genes, confirming Selank's immune-regulating role.

research.title: The temporary dynamics of inflammation-related genes expression under tuftsin analog Selank action
research.summary: Selank and its Gly-Pro fragment similarly influenced multiple immune-related genes.

research.title: Selank Administration Affects the Expression of Some Genes Involved in GABAergic Neurotransmission
research.summary: Selank induces changes in GABA neurotransmission genes, suggesting a mechanism similar to benzodiazepines.

research.title: Peptide-based Anxiolytics: The Molecular Aspects of Heptapeptide Selank Biological Activity
research.summary: Selank functions as a positive allosteric modulator of GABA receptors, offering anxiety relief.

research.title: Physiological Effects of Selank and Its Fragments
research.summary: Analyzed data on Selank's benefits including anxiety reduction, cognitive enhancement, and immune stimulation.

research.title: Use of Selank to correct measures of integrative brain activity in adult rats from Antenatal Hypoxia
research.summary: Selank improved sensory attention, learning, and behaviors in rats while restoring serotonin balance.

research.title: The effectiveness of selank in the treatment of adjustment disorder
research.summary: Selank significantly reduced symptoms of Adjustment Disorder including somatic complaints.

research.title: Peptide Selank Enhances the Effect of Diazepam in Reducing Anxiety
research.summary: Selank works similarly to benzodiazepines and can enhance diazepam's effects under chronic stress.

research.title: Selank and Short Peptides of the Tuftsin Family in the Regulation of Adaptive Behavior in Stress
research.summary: Evaluated peptide compounds including Selank for emotional and antistress effects.

sentiment.summary: Highly regarded for anxiety relief without sedation or addiction. Users report calm focus and improved stress resilience. Often preferred over semax for anxiety-prone individuals.

effects.label: Versatile:
effects.description: Benefits both anxiety and cognitive function.

dosage.label: Daily Use:
dosage.description: Can be used consistently without tolerance.

sideEffects.label: Fatigue:
sideEffects.description: Some report tiredness at higher doses.

availability.label: Nasal Spray:
availability.description: Often sold as premade nasal spray.
